mapper.select: SELECT id, name, gender, phone, level, points, status FROM members ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (name, gender, phone, level, points, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{level}, #{points}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, level = #{level}, points = #{points}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
